response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 00:00-03:13 is an introduction segment for merchandise, followed by a song introduction. 03:14-05:00 is a vocal performance. 2. Identified song 'Soar' via on-screen text at 03:23 and credits '作詞・作曲: ナナホシ管弦楽団' (Lyrics/Composition: Nanahoshi Orchestra). 3. Searched for lyrics using 'Soar ナナホシ管弦楽団 歌詞', but no direct hits found. 4. Transcribed and translated the lyrics directly from the video performance for the song 'Soar'. 5. Structured the data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Takane Lui introducing her birthday merchandise for 2026, followed by a vocal performance of her original song 'Soar', which was composed by Nanahoshi Orchestra.

scenes.description: Takane Lui introduces her 2026 birthday merchandise, including an acrylic diorama stand, pin badges, a pouch, and a plushie.
Takane Lui performs her original song 'Soar'. On-screen text credits the lyrics and composition to Nanahoshi Orchestra.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく
一歩踏み出した らもう未来さ
昨日つまずいた道も 今日からは近道だ
息をするたびに広がる景色
私を信じていいと言って
つぶやきも希望になって あふれては声になって
何度目を閉じても消せないな
高く飛べるよ そうだろう
抑えられない 羽ばたく理由を誰かに許されなくても
もう決めたよ 迷わない
向かい風も きっと進んでる証拠だって
君に伝えるんだ
どんな重力も 心までは縛れない 曲げられない
この手で確かめたい
胸焦がした思いで 爪痕をさ刻んで
嵐の空模様 切り裂いて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I will call you again and again and keep walking.
Once I take one step, it's already the future.
Even the road I stumbled on yesterday is a shortcut from today.
The scenery expands every time I breathe.
Tell me it's okay to believe in myself.
Murmurs turn into hope, overflowing and becoming a voice.
No matter how many times I close my eyes, I can't erase it.
I can fly high, right?
I can't suppress it, even if no one forgives the reason I spread my wings.
I've already decided, I won't waver.
Even the headwind is proof that I'm moving forward.
I will tell you.
No gravity can bind my heart, cannot bend it.
I want to confirm it with these hands.
With the feelings that scorched my heart, I will carve my mark.
Tearing through the storm in the sky.
